info.name: Doctor Clinic API
info.description:
Doctor Clinic API – All Endpoints

## Token Auto-Storage

All Login/Register responses include a **Tests** script that automatically stores `access_token`, `refresh_token`, and `expires_in` as collection variables. No manual copy-paste needed.

## Authenticated Requests

The **Auth**, **Locations** (management), and **Images** folders have a **Pre-request Script** that attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` to every request automatically.

item.name: Auth
item.description:
All authentication operations.

**Pre-request Script** attaches the Bearer token automatically for protected routes.

item.name: Locations
item.description:
Countries and Cities CRUD.

Public routes: List / Get.
Protected routes (auth required): Create, Update, Delete.

item.name: Images
item.description:
Image upload, serve & delete.

All endpoints require authentication (Bearer token). Images are stored privately and served through the API (not publicly accessible).

Upload accepts `multipart/form-data`:
- `file`: image file (jpg, jpeg, png, webp)
- `type`: enum (`user`, `country`)
- `imageable_id`: UUID of the target object

formdata.description: Image file (jpg, jpeg, png, webp)
Image type: user or country
UUID of the target object

item.name: Appointments
item.description:
Full appointment lifecycle: request, set time, respond, cancel, complete, suggest alternative.

All endpoints require authentication (Bearer token).

query.description: Filter by status(es). Single (?status=accepted) or multiple (?status[]=set&status[]=accepted)
Filter by doctor(s). Single (?doctor_id=uuid) or multiple (?doctor_id[]=uuid1&uuid2)

    }
}

item.name: Supervisions
item.description:
Doctor-Patient supervision management.

All endpoints require authentication. Assign/Remove/Bulk require staff role. Available-doctors and supervision requests require auth. Doctor self-assign is for the doctor themselves.

query.description: Filter by supervision status(es). Single (?status=active) or multiple (?status[]=active&status[]=suspended)

item.name: Supervision Requests
item.description: Patient requests supervision from a doctor. Doctor approves/rejects. Patient can cancel.

item.name: Medicines
item.description:
Medicines CRUD.

Read endpoints (GET) and Create (POST) are available to all authenticated users. Update (PUT) and Delete (DELETE) require admin, doctor, or receptionist role.

Patients are limited to creating 15 medicines per day.

query.description: Search by name, description, barcode, or manufacturer

item.name: Medical Records
item.description:
Medical record management.

Admin-only endpoints for transferring medical records between doctors.

item.name: Users
item.description:
Admin user management.

All endpoints require `admin` role.

Every request in this folder automatically attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` via the Pre-request Script.

item.name: Doctor Appointments
item.description:
Doctor-specific appointment endpoints with date filtering.

Every request in this folder automatically attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` via the Pre-request Script.

item.name: Prescriptions
item.description:
Prescription CRUD nested under medical records.

Read endpoints (GET) are available to all authenticated users with role-based scoping (doctors see only their patients, patients see only their own). Write endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE) require admin or doctor role.

Every request in this folder automatically attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` via the Pre-request Script.

item.name: Prescription Items
item.description:
Prescription item CRUD nested under prescriptions.

Read endpoints (GET) are available to all authenticated users with role-based scoping. Write endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE) require admin or doctor role.

Every request in this folder automatically attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` via the Pre-request Script.
